name: python3-pyinotify
title: python3-pyinotify
description:
simple Linux inotify Python bindings
pyinotify is a simple wrapper for the Linux inotify mechanism.
.
inotify is a Linux Kernel feature available since 2.6.13. inotify makes
it possible for applications to easily be notified of filesystem changes.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyinotify because simple Linux inotify Python bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyinotify as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyinotify with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyinotify --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
